patch:
--- a/adder_unit.v
+++ b/adder_unit.v
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 module adder_unit(
     input [15:0] operand_a,
     input [15:0] operand_b,
     output [16:0] sum_out
 );
-    always @(operand_a) begin
+    always @(operand_a or operand_b) begin
         sum_out = operand_a + operand_b;
     end
 endmodule
